metadata.title: Pocketbook Cloud Highlight Importer
metadata.description: Pocketbook Cloud Highlight Importer Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The mail address you log in to the pocketbook cloud with
ast.target: 您用于登录 PocketBook 云的邮箱地址

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the shop you are logging in to. Will be auto-filled on login - only change if that does not work well and you know what you are doing.
ast.target: 您要登录的商店名称。登录时会自动填充——仅当自动填充不正常且您清楚自己在做什么时才修改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder the plugin will write to. The folder should be empty, do not store other data here.
ast.target: 插件将写入的文件夹。该文件夹应为空，不要在此存储其他数据。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter your folder path from vault root
ast.target: 从保险库根目录输入您的文件夹路径

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ❌ Error: Username is required and cannot be empty
ast.target: ❌ 错误：用户名为必填项，不能为空

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ❌ Error: Client ID is required and cannot be empty
ast.target: ❌ 错误：客户端 ID 为必填项，不能为空

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ❌ Error: Client secret is required and cannot be empty
ast.target: ❌ 错误：客户端密钥为必填项，不能为空

ast.name: text
ast.source: Settings for Pocketbook Cloud Highlights Importer Plugin
ast.target: PocketBook 云高亮内容导入插件的设置

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter your password (password will not be saved).
ast.target: 输入您的密码（密码不会被保存）。
